DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF THE PERSON MOST QUALIFIED OF DEFENDANT AND CROSS-DEFENDANT WILAD PROPERTIES, LLC AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. (CCP SEC. 2025.450(A).) DEFENDANT WILAD'S PERSON MOST QUALIFIED IS ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AT A DATE, TIME, AND LOCATION TO BE NOTICED BY DEFENDANT NO LATER THAN APRIL 14, 2025 UNLESS THE PARTIES MUTUALLY AGREE TO A LATER DATE. DEFENDANT WILAD SHALL SERVE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO THE DOCUMENT REQUESTS SET FORTH IN THE AMENDED NOTICE OF DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS. WILAD MUST PAY SANCTIONS OF $2,500 TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, NO LATER THAN APRIL 14, 2025 (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of The Person Most Qualified Of Defendant And Cross-Defendant Wilad Properties, Llc And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Harold Selan, Esq., Law Office Of Harold Selan, 925-639-4400 for Plaintiff: JANE GAZZOLA (via ZOOM) (Mr Selan, has not made an appearance in this matter but states that he is working with counsel Steven Fabbro, counsel of record for Plaintiff Jane Gazzola)
MARGARET S. SCHROEDER, Esq., Deputy City Attorney (415) 554- 3843 DeeDee.Schroeder@sfcityatty.org Attorneys for Defendant and Cross-Complainant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies and adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel The Deposition Of The Person Most Qualified Of Defendant And Cross-Defendant Wilad Properties, Llc And Request For Sanctions

The motion to compel is GRANTED. (CCP sec. 2025.450(a).) Defendant Wilad's person most qualified is ordered to appear for deposition at a date, time, and location to be noticed by Defendant no later than April 14, 2025 unless the parties mutually agree to a later date. Defendant Wilad shall serve code compliant responses to the document requests set forth in the Amended Notice of Deposition and produce any responsive documents. Wilad must pay sanctions of $2,500 to Defendant City and County of San Francisco, no later than April 14, 2025

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted. The recent trial continuance eliminates any possible legal prejudice to Wilad Properties. Granting the motion is in keeping with California's strong policy of liberally allowing amendments to pleadings.

Order signed.
